Social Events

Social Events at NEPC

Theme nights, holiday socials, member mixers, and glow pickleball for players who want structured, fun play without committing to a league.

View Calendar Ask a Club

What Belongs Here

Clear social formats, without duplicating the league page.

This page keeps social play separate from competitive leagues and team tournaments. When a social is confirmed, the details can point people back to the calendar for registration.

View Calendar

Theme Nights

Music, rotating partners, and a different feel from a standard open-play block.

Both clubs Calendar registration
View Calendar

Holiday Socials

Seasonal play blocks for members and guests who want organized games around club events.

Members + guests Dates by calendar
View Calendar

Glow Pickleball

Lights-down, music-up pickleball with a party feel and structured court rotations.

Special event Glow format
See Glow Events

Why Social Events Work

Easy to join, easy to staff, easy to keep current.

Every social should have one clear registration path, one calendar source of truth, and enough structure that players know what to expect before they arrive.

1

Calendar first

Confirmed events link to the calendar instead of repeating stale dates across the site.

2

Both clubs supported

Middleton and Rye can each promote socials without mixing them into league registration.

3

Structured play

Rotations, themes, and staff direction make the event feel social without becoming chaotic.

4

Simple updates

New flyers, themes, and confirmed dates can be added here later without changing the league page.

Social Play Paths

Pick the right kind of event.

A social is different from a league, a private party, or a corporate outing. The page should help players find the right path quickly.

For players

Use the calendar for confirmed socials, theme nights, and one-off events at either club.

View Calendar

For private groups

Use private events when the group wants its own court block, staffing, or custom format.

Private Events

For companies

Use corporate events for team outings, group instruction, and hosted pickleball experiences.

Corporate Events

Custom Outings

Need something more private?

Keep social events focused on club programming, and route bigger private or company groups to the event pages built for those requests.

Private Events

Parties, birthdays, friend groups, and hosted pickleball blocks.

Corporate Events

Team outings, client events, and private group pickleball.

Calendar Source of Truth

When a social is confirmed, registration should live on the calendar.

This keeps the public website clean: the page explains the event types, while the calendar carries the specific dates, times, club location, and registration details.

View Calendar Contact a Club
